overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City at night, approaching and entering the 'Dicky Twister' nightclub. The scene transitions from a neon-lit urban street under an elevated highway to the club's interior featuring vibrant red and green neon lighting, a central stage, and scattered patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street beneath elevated highway

events.description: camera turns slightly right toward the club entrance while continuing forward
approaching the Dicky Twister club entrance from the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk toward the nightclub entrance, passing under the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: black sedan parked along the street curb
pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large red neon sign with green phallic symbol mounted on the building facade
massive concrete overpass structure with metal beams spanning the street
illuminated advertisement screen on the distant building
tall futuristic street lamp with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night under an elevated highway. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk toward the 'Dicky Twister' nightclub, identifiable by its prominent red neon signage. A parked black sedan sits on the left while a pedestrian crosses the street ahead. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub entrance corridor with neon-lit pillars

events.description: entering the covered entrance area dominated by intense red neon lighting from vertical pillars
passing through the entrance gates into the interior corridor leading to the main club

agents.ego_description: walking through the club's entrance corridor, passing red velvet ropes and neon-lit columns toward the interior

notable_agents.action: club patron standing near the entrance gate looking toward the street

entered.detail: barrier ropes lining the entrance pathway leading to the club doors
structural columns wrapped in vertical red neon light strips
small booth with cyan 'PAY HERE' neon sign above it

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered entrance area of the nightclub, leaving the open street behind. Red velvet ropes guide the path forward between neon-lit pillars. The lighting shifts to intense red and green neon. A ticket booth with a 'PAY HERE' sign appears on the right as the camera approaches the interior doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub main floor with central stage and bar areas

events.description: entering the main club floor revealing the central stage and bar area with dramatic neon lighting
camera turns right and begins ascending the illuminated stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: moving through the crowded nightclub interior, observing the central stage and navigating toward the back stairs

notable_agents.action: pole dancer performing on the central illuminated circular stage
patron leaning against the wall near the illuminated stairs

entered.detail: circular bar with green neon trim and a central pole for performances
curved bar area with green neon lighting and bottles visible behind
long rectangular red neon lights hanging from the ceiling
staircase with bright green LED strip lighting on each step

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main club interior, revealing a spacious room bathed in red and green neon light. A central stage with a pole dancer dominates the middle of the room, surrounded by a circular bar. Patrons stand scattered throughout, some watching the performance. The camera moves toward the back of the club, passing illuminated stairs on the right that lead to an upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban street into the vibrant, neon-drenched interior of the Dicky Twister nightclub. It begins by moving along a futuristic sidewalk under an elevated highway, passing a parked black sedan and a pedestrian while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding city lights. As the camera approaches the club's prominent red signage, the scene shifts into a covered entrance where red velvet ropes and neon-lit pillars guide the path past a ticket booth. The environment then opens into the main club interior, where the lighting transforms into an intense blend of red and green neon. Finally, the camera glides past a central stage with a pole dancer and a circular bar, moving toward the back of the room and passing illuminated stairs leading to an upper level.
